---
title: "Recherche"
pagetitle: "Recherche — Hugo Trad"
description: "Racines cognitives de la complexité administrative — articles publiés, en préparation, et thèse de doctorat."
lang: fr
format:
  html:
    page-layout: custom
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="en" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/en/research">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="fr" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/fr/recherche">
          <link rel="alternate" hreflang="ar" href="https://hdtrad.github.io/ar/research">
---

```{=html}
<nav class="langswitch" aria-label="Langue">
  <a href="../en/research.html">EN</a>
  <a href="../fr/recherche.html" class="is-active">FR</a>
  <a href="../ar/research.html">AR</a>
</nav>

<main class="content content--inner">
  <header class="site-header">
    <a href="index.html" class="site-header__brand">Hugo Trad</a>
    <nav class="site-header__nav">
      <a href="recherche.html" class="is-active">Recherche</a>
      <a href="projets.html">Projets</a>
      <a href="enseignement.html">Enseignement</a>
      <a href="cv.html">CV</a>
    </nav>
  </header>

  <article class="inner">
    <h1 class="inner__title">Recherche</h1>
    <p class="inner__intro">En combinant sciences comportementales, méthodologies d'amélioration des processus, intelligence collective et IA, mes travaux articulent trois questions : pourquoi la cognition humaine produit une complexité administrative inutile, ce que cette complexité fait aux personnes qui la vivent, et comment les organisations peuvent la détecter et la réduire en pratique.</p>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Publié</h2>
      <ul class="paper-list">
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1017/bpp.2025.10025">Laypeople have difficulty processing efficiency when assessing environmental policies</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta">Marie, A., <em>Trad, H.</em>, &amp; Strickland, B. · <em>Behavioural Public Policy</em>, 2025 · doi:10.1017/bpp.2025.10025</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Articles en préparation</h2>
      <ul class="paper-list">
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="#">When more is less: Additive bias as a source of sludge in policy design</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em>, Winters, J., &amp; Strickland, B. · Article en préparation</p>
        </li>
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="#">Outcome bias and the persistence of sludge</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em> · Article en préparation</p>
        </li>
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="#">The moral foundations of sludge</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta"><em>Trad, H.</em> &amp; Strickland, B. · Article en préparation</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>

    <section class="inner__section">
      <h2 class="inner__h2">Thèse de doctorat</h2>
      <ul class="paper-list">
        <li>
          <p class="paper-list__title"><a href="#">The War on Sludge: Uncovering the Cognitive Roots of Administrative Complexity</a></p>
          <p class="paper-list__meta">Doctorat, Institut Jean Nicod · École normale supérieure (PSL), 2024</p>
        </li>
      </ul>
    </section>
  </article>
</main>
```
